title: Good Time Charley
writer: Darryl F. Zanuck, Owen Davis, Anthony Coldeway
actors: Warner Oland, Helene Costello, Clyde Cook
plot: Charley Keane is a well-known vaudeville performer who seems to have everything going for him--fame, money, and a beautiful daughter on whom he dotes. Unfortunately, things start to slide downhill for Charley, both career-wise and...
